name: ColorPalette
desc: An abstract class that defines the color palette for the app. Used in main.dart to build the application theme.

name: PurpleDream
desc: Missive's main color palette. A dark theme with purple and grey colors that's easy on the eyes.

name: AuthProvider
desc: Provides everything related to authentication and user management.

name: AuthProvider
desc: Creates a new AuthProvider with a Dio client and FlutterSecureStorage.

name: accessToken
desc: Returns the access token as a String, or null if it's not available.

name: loadProfile
desc: Loads the user's profile from the server and updates the locally cached user.

name: login
desc: Logs in a user and returns an AuthenticationResult, that can either be AuthenticationSuccess or AuthenticationError.

name: logout
desc: Logs out a user and clears the stored tokens.

name: refreshToken
desc: Returns the refresh token as a String, or null if it's not available.

name: register
desc: Registers a new user and returns an AuthenticationResult, that can either be AuthenticationSuccess or AuthenticationError.

name: user
desc: Returns the currently authenticated User, or null if it's not available.

name: AuthenticationError
desc: Represents a generic error during an authentication attempt.

name: stackTrace
desc: The stack trace at the point where this error was first thrown.

name: AuthenticationResult
desc: Generic result of an authentication attempt.

name: AuthenticationSuccess
desc: Represents a successful authentication attempt.

name: AuthenticationTimeoutError
desc: Represents an error during an authentication attempt due to a timeout.

name: DuplicateUserError
desc: Represents an error during a register attempt due to a duplicate username.

name: InvalidCredentialsError
desc: Represents an error during an authentication attempt due to invalid credentials.

name: TOTPInvalidError
desc: Represents an error during an authentication attempt due to an invalid TOTP.

name: TOTPRequiredError
desc: Represents an error during an authentication attempt due to a required TOTP. This is not exactly an error, but still a special case that requires different handling.

name: ChatProvider
desc:
Provides chat-related functionalities, handling messaging operations, WebSocket connections,
and encrypted local storage in a Realm database.

name: connect
desc: Connects to the WebSocket server and listens for incoming messages.

name: connected
desc: Whether or not the provider is connected to the WebSocket server. Used to update the UI based on the connection status.

name: deleteAll
desc: Deletes all messages and the user's Realm database.

name: dispose
desc:
Disposes the provider and closes the WebSocket connection.
This method is called when the user logs out, as we need to clean up the resources to avoid sessions getting mixed up.

name: fetchMessageStatuses
desc: Fetches the latest message statuses from the server and updates the local Realm database accordingly.

name: fetchPendingMessages
desc: Fetches pending messages from the server and stores them locally in the user's Realm database.

name: needsUpdate
desc: Checks if the provider needs to be updated. This method is used to determine if the provider is fully initialized, so we don't update it multiple times.

name: notifyRead
desc: Notifies the server that a message has been read, and updates the local Realm database accordingly.

name: reset
desc: Resets the provider to its initial state. This method is used when the user logs out.

name: sendMessage
desc: Sends an encrypted message to the server and stores it locally in the user's Realm database.

name: setupUserRealm
desc: Sets up the user's Realm database and listens for changes.

name: update
desc: Updates the provider with new values. This method is used when the user logs in, as we cannot initialize a provider in ProxyProvider with the user's data, and have to do it after the user logs in.

name: InitializationError
desc: Represents an initialization error. Used when the ChatProvider is not fully initialized, and an operation is attempted.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: fromShortString
desc: Converts a string to a Status enum.

name: ConversationScreen
desc: This screen is used to display a conversation with a user. It displays the messages in a chat-like interface, and allows the user to send messages.

name: ConversationsScreen
desc: This screen is used to display the list of conversations the user has.

name: DefaultFirebaseOptions
desc: Default FirebaseOptions for use with your Firebase apps.

name: dio
desc: The global Dio instance used for all HTTP requests.

name: LandingScreen
desc: The landing screen for the application. Allows users to register or login, and provides a nice entry point to the application.

name: MessageBubble
desc: This widget is used to display a message bubble in the chat screen. It can be used to display messages from the sender or from the receiver.

name: NamespacedSecureStorage
desc:
A wrapper around FlutterSecureStorage that allows for namespacing keys.
This is used when we want to store multiple keys, but want to avoid key collisions.

name: delete
desc: Deletes the value associated with the given key.

name: deleteAll
desc: Deletes all keys and values from the secure storage.

name: read
desc: Returns the value associated with the given key.

name: write
desc: Writes the given value to the given key.

name: SecureStorageIdentityKeyStore
desc: A secure storage-based implementation of the IdentityKeyStore interface from the Signal protocol.

name: SecureStorageIdentityKeyStore
desc: Constructs an instance of SecureStorageIdentityKeyStore with a secure storage manager.

name: SecureStorageIdentityKeyStore.fromIdentityKeyPair
desc: Constructs an instance of SecureStorageIdentityKeyStore and stores the IdentityKeyPair and registrationId.

name: getIdentity
desc: Retrieves the stored identity key for a given address.

name: getIdentityKeyPair
desc: Retrieves the user's identity key pair from secure storage.

name: getLocalRegistrationId
desc: Retrieves the local registration ID from secure storage.

name: isTrustedIdentity
desc: Checks if the identity key is trusted by comparing it with stored data.

name: saveIdentity
desc: Saves the identity key for a given address in secure storage.

name: SecureStoragePreKeyStore
desc: A class that implements PreKeyStore to store, retrieve, and manage pre keys using SecureStorage.

name: containsPreKey
desc: Checks if a pre key with the given preKeyId exists in the secure storage.

name: loadPreKey
desc: Loads a serialized PreKeyRecord from SecureStorage and returns it as a PreKeyRecord.

name: removePreKey
desc: Removes a pre key with the given preKeyId from the secure storage.

name: storePreKey
desc: Stores a PreKeyRecord in the device's secure storage.

name: SecureStorageSessionStore
desc: A class that implements SessionStore to store, retrieve, and manage sessions using SecureStorage.

name: containsSession
desc: Checks if a session with the given address exists in the secure storage.

name: deleteAllSessions
desc: Deletes all sessions associated with the given name.

name: deleteSession
desc: Deletes the session associated with the given address.

name: getSubDeviceSessions
desc: Retrieves sub-device sessions associated with the given name.

name: loadSession
desc: Loads a serialized SessionRecord from SecureStorage and returns it as a SessionRecord.

name: storeSession
desc: Stores a SessionRecord in the device's secure storage.

name: SecureStorageSignedPreKeyStore
desc: A class that implements SignedPreKeyStore to store, retrieve, and manage signed pre keys using SecureStorage.

name: containsSignedPreKey
desc: Checks if a signed pre key with the given signedPreKeyId exists in the secure storage.

name: loadSignedPreKey
desc: Loads a serialized SignedPreKeyRecord from SecureStorage and returns it as a SignedPreKeyRecord.

name: loadSignedPreKeys
desc: Loads all serialized SignedPreKeyRecords from SecureStorage and returns them as a list of SignedPreKeyRecords.

name: removeSignedPreKey
desc: Removes a signed pre key with the given signedPreKeyId from the secure storage.

name: storeSignedPreKey
desc: Stores a SignedPreKeyRecord in the device's secure storage.

name: MissingTokenError
desc: Error thrown when an access token is missing.

name: SignalProvider
desc: Provides higher-level functions for Missive's Signal protocol implementation. Allows to access stores, generate keys, and initialize the application, among server communication to keep the keys up to date.

name: buildSession
desc: Builds a Signal session with a given user. This session is used for subsequent message encryption and decryption.

name: decrypt
desc: Decrypts a CiphertextMessage received from a given SignalProtocolAddress.

name: encrypt
desc: Encrypts a plaintext message for a given user and returns a CiphertextMessage.

name: fetchPreKeyBundle
desc: Fetches a pre-key bundle from the server. This is used when a user wants to start a conversation with another user.

name: initialize
desc: Initializes the Signal protocol stores. If installing is true, generates a new identity key pair, registration ID, signed pre key, and pre keys.

name: TOTPModal
desc: A widget made to handle TOTP authentication. It will display a modal with a text field for the user to input their TOTP, and a submit button. If the TOTP is invalid, it will display an error message.

name: onHandleTotp
desc:
Function that will be called when the user submits the TOTP. It should handle the login process,
and return a boolean representing whether the TOTP is valid or not.

name: User
desc: Represents a user. Used in the authentication flow.

name: UserSearchScreen
desc: This screen is used to search for users by their username, and start a conversation with them.
